output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?rank WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'bofrost cup') && LANG(?label) = 'en')
  ?event wdt:P585 ?time .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) = 2002)
  ?event wdt:P1529 ?participant .
  ?participant wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  ?participant wdt:P27 wd:Q145 .
  ?participant wdt:P2949 ?rank .
}
